## How to test
- [ ] Run `npm install`
- [ ] Run `npm run dev`
- [ ] Open the Vite local URL
- [ ] Test the affected UI/feature

## Checklist
- [ ] My change is focused
- [ ] I tested locally
- [ ] I added screenshots for UI changes
- [ ] I did not commit generated files like `node_modules` or `dist`
